expectations.text: Identifies this as a REFACTORING (structure-only, behavior-preserving), not a transformation
expectations.evidence: LLM judge: Says 'this isn't a TPP move at all. You're in the refactor step' and 'structure-only change that preserves behavior. That's a refactoring'.

expectations.text: Declines to name a numbered / priority-ranked transformation (it belongs to the refactor step)
expectations.evidence: LLM judge: Explicitly: 'there's no next transformation for me to name -- picking one would be the wrong tool.' No numbered transformation assigned.

expectations.text: Coach, don't drive (no edit / no test run)
